explainability.findings: A policy statement mentions the provision of explanations for automated decisions.
explainability.path_to_improvement: Publish user-facing explanation interfaces or documented appeal workflows.

relevant_sources.summary: This policy statement from Henry Schein One UK Ltd provides evidence for the pillars of explainability, governance, privacy, and transparency. It supports explainability by mentioning the provision of explanations for automated decisions, and governance through its commitment to responsible AI use and compliance with laws. The policy also addresses privacy by detailing data retention and anonymization policies for AI training, and transparency by describing data processing for AI model refinement and the use of third-party AI services.
relevant_sources.title: Henry Schein One UK Ltd AI Policy Statement

external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Obtain external validation of AI practices or require vendor certifications.

fairness.findings: A press release mentions equitable access in relation to fairness practices.
fairness.path_to_improvement: Publish bias testing results, outcome monitoring, or vendor fairness certifications.

relevant_sources.summary: This press release provides evidence for fairness, governance, and transparency in responsible AI. It supports transparency by detailing the use of specific AI tools like Amazon Transcribe Medical and Amazon Bedrock, and by outlining an AI-augmented system and roadmap. The press release also touches on fairness by mentioning equitable access, and governance by implying secure data handling for AI-driven recommendations and diagnosis.
relevant_sources.title: Henry Schein One and AWS Leverage Generative AI to Revolutionize Dentistry

governance.findings: Policy statements outline a commitment to responsible AI use and compliance with relevant laws. The company's sustainability report mentions the issuance of Global Principles on Responsible Use of AI Systems and the addition of AI training modules. Furthermore, a webinar event page indicates a commitment to AI governance through discussions of applying AI responsibly and mentions an assessment process with a specific timeframe.
governance.path_to_improvement: Name an AI governance body with defined mandate covering all AI use.

relevant_sources.summary: This press release from Henry Schein supports the **governance** and **privacy** pillars of responsible AI. It indicates strong governance by referencing the issuance of updated Worldwide Business Standards and Global Principles for the Responsible Use of AI Systems. Furthermore, the mention of Global Principles on Data Protection directly supports the privacy pillar by highlighting the company's commitment to responsible data handling within AI.
relevant_sources.title: Ethisphere Names Henry Schein 2025 Worlds Most Ethical Companies

oversight.path_to_improvement: Document human review processes for AI-assisted decisions (built or vendor AI).

privacy.path_to_improvement: Publish AI-specific privacy impact assessments or data handling procedures.

transparency.findings: Henry Schein provides transparency by describing data processing for AI model refinement and the use of third-party AI services. The company details the use of specific AI tools like Amazon Transcribe Medical and Amazon Bedrock, outlining an AI-augmented system and roadmap. Furthermore, press releases explain the integration and functionalities of AI-powered tools from vendors like VideaHealth and Bola AI, including their use cases for clinical decision support.
transparency.path_to_improvement: Publish detailed documentation (model cards, system specs) for AI systems deployed.

relevant_sources.summary: This press release provides evidence for the **transparency** pillar of responsible AI. It details the integration of specific AI-powered tools from VideaHealth and Bola AI into Dentrix Ascend, explaining their functionalities such as X-ray analysis and voice-enabled charting. This explicit mention of third-party AI vendors and their use cases offers transparency into how AI is being utilized for clinical decision support.
relevant_sources.title: Henry Schein One Integrates Artificial Intelligence Solutions in Dentrix Ascend

summary.overall_findings: Based on 13 publicly available sources, Henry Schein's published materials address 5 of 7 evaluated responsible AI pillars. Policy statements describe data processing for AI model refinement under transparency, and detail data retention policies for AI training within privacy. Additionally, disclosures outline a commitment to responsible AI use under governance, mention the provision of explanations for automated decisions in explainability, and a press release references equitable access related to fairness. No qualifying public evidence was found for oversight or external accountability.
